items.title: Police identify suspect in Rhode Island ice rink shooting
items.dek: Two people were killed and three others were injured at a shooting at a high school hockey game in Pawtucket.
items.body: Two people were killed and three others were injured at a shooting at a high school hockey game in Pawtucket.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Spain blocks access to NordVPN and Proton VPN during football matches

items.title: US soldiers arrive in Nigeria to aid its fight against Islamist militants
items.dek: The troops, who landed at an airfield in Bauchi state, will not take part in combat operations, officials say.
items.body: The troops, who landed at an airfield in Bauchi state, will not take part in combat operations, officials say.
